macro.name: i2sIsBufferComplete
macro.brief: Checks if the current callback refers to a full buffer.
macro.param: Pointer to the I2S driver instance.

macro.name: _i2s_reset_i
macro.brief: Resumes a thread waiting for I2S exchange completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the I2S driver instance.

macro.name: _i2s_reset_s
macro.brief: Resumes a thread waiting for I2S exchange completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the I2S driver instance.

macro.name: _i2s_wakeup_isr
macro.brief: Wakes up a thread waiting for an I2S exchange state.
macro.param: Pointer to the I2S driver instance.

macro.name: _i2s_error_wakeup_isr
macro.brief: Wakes up a thread waiting for I2S exchange termination because of an error.
macro.param: Pointer to the I2S driver instance.

macro.name: _i2s_isr_half_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code, half buffer event.
macro.param: Pointer to the I2S driver instance.

macro.name: _i2s_isr_full_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code, full buffer event.
macro.param: Pointer to the I2S driver instance.

macro.name: _i2s_isr_error_code
macro.param: Pointer to the I2S driver instance.

typedef.name: hal_i2s_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an I2S driver.

typedef.name: hal_i2s_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an I2S configuration.

field.name: size
field.brief: TX and RX buffer size as number of samples.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ i2s_lld_config_fields;
/* End of the mandatory fields.*/ i2s_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: i2sStartExchangeI
i2sStartExchange
i2sStopExchangeI
method.brief: Stops the ongoing I2S data exchange.

method.name: i2sStopExchange
method.brief: Stops the ongoing I2S data exchange.

method.name: i2sSynchronizeStateS
method.brief: Synchronizes with an I2S exchange state.
method.details: This function synchronizes with a future occurrence of the specified exchange state. State occurrences are not buffered, the waiting thread must already be waiting when the state is reached.
method.retval: If the requested state has been reached.
If exchange stopped or failed while waiting.

method.name: i2sSynchronizeState
method.brief: Synchronizes with an I2S exchange state.
method.details: This function synchronizes with a future occurrence of the specified exchange state. State occurrences are not buffered, the waiting thread must already be waiting when the state is reached.
method.retval: If the requested state has been reached.
If exchange stopped or failed while waiting.

method.name: i2sGetEventsX
method.brief: Returns the cached I2S event flags.

method.name: i2sGetAndClearEventsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached I2S event flags.
method.param: Mask of events to be returned and cleared.

method.name: i2sGetErrorsX
method.brief: Returns the cached I2S error flags.

method.name: i2sGetAndClearErrorsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached I2S error flags.
method.param: Mask of errors to be returned and cleared.

method.name: start
